title: Abdollah Khan appointed governor of Khuzestan; titles granted to sons
description: The shah appointed Abdollah Khan governor of Khuzestan and titled him Sardar Akram. At his request Hossein Qoli Khan received Sa'ed al-Saltaneh and Mohtaj Ali Khan received Ejlal al-Mamalek.

title: Gharagozloo participation in Mohammad Shah’s Herat campaign
description: Thousands of Gharagozloo troops served under Nabi Khan. Abdollah Khan supported his force; Gharagozloo troops helped assault the fortifications. Nabi Khan was killed after severe wounds.

title: British occupation of Bushehr and dispersal of the Gharagozloo guard
description: British forces attacked Bushehr to pressure Iran to withdraw from Herat. The fifty-man Gharagozloo guard was driven off because of its small size.

title: Gharagozloo participation in the Anglo-Persian War in southern Iran
description: Mostafa Qoli Khan, Rustam Khan, and Ali Khan served against British forces around Bandar Lengeh, Bushehr, Dalaki, and Borazjan.

title: Defeat of Nasrallah Khan of Laristan
description: Ali Naqi Khan led the Dargazin regiment and defeated Nasrallah Khan in Bikhuh district.

title: Gharagozloo military service in Kerman
description: Ali Khan Nosrat al-Molk and other Gharagozloo officers served in Kerman; Mohammad Hossein Khan later received the title Hosam al-Molk.

title: Marriage of Gholamreza Khan and Qamar al-Saltaneh
description: A lavish dynastic marriage arranged by Zeyn al-Abedin Khan Hosam al-Molk.

title: Arrest of Hamadan Gharagozloo amir-tumans
description: Following unrest in Hamadan, Hosam al-Molk, Saed al-Saltaneh, and Zia al-Molk were dismissed and detained.
